data.title: Excellere Partners partners with Hinterland Group, a top provider of water infrastructure services in Southern US.
data.description: Excellere Partners, a private equity firm based in Denver, has formed a partnership with Hinterland Group, a prominent provider of maintenance and repair solutions for underground water infrastructure in the Southern United States. This collaboration marks Excellere's fifth platform investment in Fund IV and its fourth partnership in the region. Hinterland serves municipalities and private clients and is known for its expertise in this industry sector.
